arts.ttl: Barcelona vs. Real Madrid Live Stream: Time, TV, Channels, & How To Watch Copa de la Reina Online
arts.sum: Real Madrid face Barcelona in the second leg of the Copa de la Reina semifinals. Linda Caicedo is missing from the squad list for 3 games in a row now.

arts.ttl: Atlético de Madrid vs Real Madrid 2025 live stream: Time, TV channels and how to watch Champions League online
arts.sum: Real Madrid visit Atlético de Madrid in the return leg of the Champions League's Round of 16. Real Madrid predicted XI: Courtois, Valverde, Asencio, Rudiger, Mendy, Tchouameni, Camavinga, Bellingham, Rodrygo, Vinicius, Mbappe.

arts.ttl: Mbappé in Madrid squad to face Atléti in UCL
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappé has been named in Real Madrid's matchday squad for their Champions League round-of-16 clash with Atlético Madrid on Wednesday, although it remains to be seen if he will start.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid announce squad for Champions League match against Atlético de Madrid
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their squad list for Wednesday's match against Atlético de Madrid in the return leg of the Champions League's Round of 16. Bellingham will also be available after missing the first leg.

arts.ttl: Lionel Messi and Kylian Mbappe humiliated after PSG beat Liverpool
arts.sum: Messi and Mbappe humiliated after PSG beat Liverpool I just want to play, and the position doesn't really matter,” he said prior to the Anfield match.

arts.ttl: Rodrygo: “The Champions League is special for me because I have done well in it”
arts.sum: “We have a special relationship and he's a person who has helped me a lot since the first day he arrived. “The games against Atlético have a different atmosphere because they're derbies, they're the two biggest teams in the city.

arts.ttl: Official: Real Madrid name squad to face Atlético
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid have on Wednesday afternoon unveiled the club’s matchday squad for their upcoming showdown with city rivals Atlético. The latest edition of the Madrid Derby is…

arts.ttl: Man United 'lining up sensational double raid' on Real Madrid to solve two major issues in squad
arts.sum: Manchester United are allegedly eyeing a double move for Real Madrid duo Aurelien Tchouameni and Andriy Lunin during this summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Atleti's Correa gets 5-match ban for ref insults
arts.sum: Atlético Madrid forward Ángel Correa has been handed a five-game ban for insulting the referee after being sent off in the club's 2-1 defeat at Getafe on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Ethan Nwaneri on cusp of breaking Kylian Mbappe's Champions League record
arts.sum: Ethan Nwaneri is looking to break one of Kylian Mbappe's Champions League records when Arsenal face PSV.
